parsed_output.justification: James claimed to be the Robber and stated he robbed Justin. Mike (the Seer) and Justin both confirmed that Justin's starting role was a Werewolf. Since the Robber swaps cards with the target, James took the Werewolf card from Justin, making James the Werewolf at the end of the night.
